Bash(cat > 'C:\\Users\\Max\\src\\lgv\\UI\\DirectoryTabView.xaml' << 'EOF'
<UserControl x:Class="lgv.UI.DirectoryTabView"
             xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
             xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
             Background="#FF1E1E1E">
    <Grid>
        <TabControl x:Name="FileTabControl"
                    Background="#FF1E1E1E"
                    BorderBrush="#FF3F3F3F"
                    ItemContainerStyle="{StaticResource DarkTabItemStyle}"
                    SelectionChanged="FileTabControl_SelectionChanged"/>
    </Grid>
</UserControl>
EOF)
